school_info.name: Autism Care Center Rupandehi Pvt. Ltd.

founder.name: Narayani Kunwar
founder.title: Founder & Director
founder.bio: Narayani Kunwar is a dedicated advocate for children with autism in Nepal. Driven by compassion and a vision for inclusive education, she established Autism Care Center Rupandehi to provide specialized support and therapy for children on the autism spectrum in the Butwal region. Her commitment to creating accessible, evidence-based care has made a significant impact on families throughout Rupandehi and beyond.

content.hero_title: Compassionate Care for Children with Autism
content.hero_subtitle: Providing specialized therapy, education, and family support for children on the autism spectrum in Rupandehi, Nepal.
content.mission: To provide comprehensive, compassionate care and evidence-based therapies for children with autism in Nepal, ensuring every child has access to the support they need to reach their full potential.
content.about_body: Autism Care Center Rupandehi Pvt. Ltd. was established to address the critical need for specialized autism services in the Butwal region. We provide individualized therapy programs, educational support, and family counseling to help children with autism develop essential skills and thrive in their communities. Our dedicated team works closely with families to create personalized care plans that celebrate each child's unique strengths.

programs.title: Early Intervention
programs.description: Intensive, play-based therapy sessions designed to support communication, social skills, and daily routines during the critical developmental window.

programs.title: School Readiness
programs.description: Bridging the gap between therapy and mainstream schooling through structured academic readiness, peer interaction, and self-regulation skills.

programs.title: Life Skills
programs.description: Practical independence training covering personal hygiene, community navigation, vocational exploration, and social communication for adolescents.

programs.title: Family Support
programs.description: Workshops, counseling, and a parent network to equip families with strategies, respite resources, and a community that truly understands.

testimonials.name: Parent from Butwal
testimonials.quote: Autism Care Center Rupandehi has been a blessing for our family. The caring staff and specialized programs have helped our child make wonderful progress. We are so grateful for their support.

testimonials.name: Family from Rupandehi
testimonials.quote: Finding this center gave us hope. The therapists truly understand our child's needs and have helped our family learn how to support their development. Thank you for everything you do.

testimonials.name: Local Community Member
testimonials.quote: The work being done at Autism Care Center Rupandehi is so important for our community. They are making a real difference in the lives of children and families affected by autism.

gallery.alt: Bright and welcoming classroom with educational materials
gallery.caption: Our sensory-friendly learning spaces
